LinkedJoin.Join: SR.SERIES_ID = S.SERIES_ID AND S.STATUS = 0 AND CSC.COURT_SESSION_ID = S.COURT_SESSION_ID AND NLR.NONLISTINGREASON_ID(+) = SR.NONLISTINGREASON_ID AND S.SESSION_DATE >= to_date('2005-11-06', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND S.SESSION_DATE <= to_date('2005-11-12', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND SR.COURT_ID = 1

Query.tables: SJC SJ SC J JT JJT CR SR

LinkedJoin.Join: SR.SERIES_ID = S.SERIES_ID AND SJC.SERIES_ID = S.SERIES_ID AND SJC.ISACTIVE = 'T' AND SJ.SERIES_ID = S.SERIES_ID AND SJ.ISACTIVE = 'T' AND SC.SERIES_ID = S.SERIES_ID AND SC.ISACTIVE = 'T' AND JJT.JUDGE_JUDGETYPE_ID = SJC.JUDGE_JUDGETYPE_ID AND JT.JUDGETYPE_ID = JJT.JUDGETYPE_ID AND SJ.JUDGE_ID = JJT.JUDGE_ID AND J.JUDGE_ID = SJ.JUDGE_ID AND SC.COURTROOM_ID = SJC.COURTROOM_ID AND CR.COURTROOM_ID = SC.COURTROOM_ID AND 'T' = SR.ISLISTING

SJ.SERIES_ID = SR.SERIES_ID AND SR.SERIES_ID = S.SERIES_ID AND SJ.ISACTIVE = 'T' AND J.JUDGE_ID = SJ.JUDGE_ID AND 'F' = SR.ISLISTING AND S.SESSION_DATE >= to_date('2005-11-06', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND S.SESSION_DATE <= to_date('2005-11-12', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND SR.COURT_ID = 1

SC.SERIES_ID = SR.SERIES_ID AND SR.SERIES_ID = S.SERIES_ID AND SC.ISACTIVE = 'T' AND CR.COURTROOM_ID = SC.COURTROOM_ID AND 'F' = SR.ISLISTING AND S.SESSION_DATE >= to_date('2005-11-06', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND S.SESSION_DATE <= to_date('2005-11-12', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND SR.COURT_ID = 1
P.POLICY_ID = SR.POLICY_ID AND SR.SERIES_ID = S.SERIES_ID AND S.SESSION_DATE >= to_date('2005-11-06', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND S.SESSION_DATE <= to_date('2005-11-12', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND SR.COURT_ID = 1
HTP.POLICY_ID = P.POLICY_ID AND HTP.ISACTIVE = 'T' AND HT.HEARINGTYPE_ID = HTP.HEARINGTYPE_ID AND HC.HEARINGCATEGORY_ID = HT.HEARINGCATEGORY_ID
